markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new GrowthX team members by introducing tools, processes, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses several tools for communication and project management: Slack, Geekbot, Linear, Notion, Loom, Zoom, and Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Onboarding resources are available in Notion and Linear, with tasks for day 1, week 1, and week 2](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Team members are expected to have 4+ hours overlap with Bandwidth time and provide daily Geekbot updates](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [GrowthX has an unlimited PTO policy (20-30 days/year) and an employee referral program](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Alice Ochieng: Executive Assistant at GrowthX, based in Nairobi, Kenya, working Pacific hours](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Nathan Navidzadeh: Based in Nova Scotia, Canada; background in biology, technical writing, creative writing, and journalism](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Felix Morgan: Based in Austin, Texas; background in sociology, content marketing, and journalism; AI enthusiast](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Lawrence: Based in Long Island, New York; extensive experience in content marketing, editorial direction, and making complex content accessible](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

### Tools Overview

  - [Slack: Instant communication, integrated with Geekbot for daily updates](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Linear: Project management tool for tracking tasks and projects](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Notion: Knowledge management system for company documents and SOPs](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Loom: Screen recording](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Zoom: Video meetings](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Fathom: Meeting recordings and note-taking (transitioning to Fireflies)](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Notion handbook contains onboarding resources for day 1, week 1, and week 2](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Linear project duplicates onboarding tasks for easy tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Onboarding buddy assigned to help with questions and issues](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### Company Policies

  - [Unlimited PTO policy (20-30 days/year recommended)](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Employee referral program: Up to $10K USD for engineering roles, $5K USD for non-engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [IT and Tools Slack channel for technical support](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Biweekly all-hands meetings (next one on Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

### Shared Email Access

  - <team@growthxlabs.com> used for shared tool access and client communication
  - [Access granted through 1Password credentials in the internal team vault](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete day 1 onboarding tasks in Linear/Notion](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Watch onboarding bootcamp recordings in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Prepare introduction for next week's all-hands meeting (name, location, fun fact)](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Attend upcoming calls with CEO Marcel and Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Set up remaining tools (1Password, Google Authenticator) if needed](https://fathom.video/share/Eh8VbRb6-MP9xopXt1kiYizHp-4uxjTL?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
